description:
This is adapted from a game I lost at our go club. Just before I fell asleep that night, it suddenly hit me that I had missed a chance to play a legendary tesuji..

The position given below is not the actual game position: I wanted to make sure the sequence actually worked (there were some difficult possibilities in the game situation) and after that I needed to make it into a unique solution. The gist, however, is the same.
